subcodes.title: Suriy-i-Asma' (=Lawh-i-Ibn?)
subcodes.first_line: The fragrance of sorrows hath encompassed the Beauty of the All-Merciful, and the gates of joy and delight have been shut fast through the tyranny of the people of rebellion [3.5s]... ...Know thou that when the Son of Man yielded up His breath to God, the whole creation wept with a great weeping.
subcodes.first_line_orig: رایحه احزان جمال رحمن را احاطه نموده و ابواب فرح و بهجت از ظلم اهل طغیان من
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @exhortations and counsels, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
